title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta Capital India
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta Capital India:
IIM Calcutta Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
